'''ngazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyriocentrically|kyriocentrically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyriocentrically|kyriocentrically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngazate|ngazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngazatesher|ngazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazatesherĂ«m|ngazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazatero|ngazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngazateshĂ«|ngazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazateshĂ«m|ngazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazatero|gokingazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingazateshĂ«|gokingazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazateshĂ«m|gokingazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongazankerom|gongazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongazankeshĂ«|gongazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongazankeshĂ«m|gongazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongazankeya|gongazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazaterom|ngazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazatemu|ngazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngazateya|ngazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazaterom|gokingazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazatemu|gokingazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingazateya|gokingazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngazazate|ngazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngazazatesher|ngazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazazatesherĂ«m|ngazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazazatero|ngazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngazazateshĂ«|ngazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazazateshĂ«m|ngazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazazatero|gokingazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingazazateshĂ«|gokingazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazazateshĂ«m|gokingazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongazazankerom|gongazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongazazankeshĂ«|gongazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongazazankeshĂ«m|gongazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongazazankeya|gongazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazazaterom|ngazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazazatemu|ngazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngazazateya|ngazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazazaterom|gokingazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazazatemu|gokingazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingazazateya|gokingazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠte|ngĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠtesher|ngĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠtero|ngĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzĂŠtero|gokingĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠterom|ngĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠtemu|ngĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠzĂŠteya|ngĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzĂŠterom|gokingĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzĂŠteya|gokingĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafzafte|ngafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafzaftesher|ngafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafzaftesherĂ«m|ngafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafzaftero|ngafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafzafteshĂ«|ngafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafzafteshĂ«m|ngafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafzaftero|gokingafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafzafteshĂ«|gokingafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafzafteshĂ«m|gokingafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafzafnkerom|gongafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafzafnkeshĂ«|gongafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafzafnkeshĂ«m|gongafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafzafnkeya|gongafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafzafterom|ngafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafzaftemu|ngafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafzafteya|ngafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafzafterom|gokingafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafzaftemu|gokingafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafzafteya|gokingafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
